data = """
Netflix Content Obligations (as of December 31, 2025):
- Less than one year: $11,528,030 thousand = $11.53 billion
- Due after one year through three years: $8,376,160 thousand = $8.38 billion  
- Due after three years through five years: $3,041,538 thousand = $3.04 billion
- Due after five years: $1,093,500 thousand = $1.09 billion
- TOTAL Content Obligations: $24,039,228 thousand = $24.04 billion

Note: This represents contractual content commitments as of year-end 2025.
The "Less than one year" amount ($11.53B) represents projected cash payments in 2026.
"""

print(data)

updates.draft_text:
【诏令草稿】关于Netflix 2025财年预计现金需求事项

一、目标
确认Netflix 2025财年预计需支付之内容义务现金总额及其支付时限分布。

二、措施
（一）据公开财务披露信息，Netflix截至2024年12月31日之Content Obligations总额为$240.39亿美元；
（二）其中$115.28亿美元（约47.9%）须于一年内支付；
（三）余款$125.11亿美元支付期限超过一年。

三、责任
（一）中书省负责起草本诏令并提交门下省审议；
（二）门下省审核后呈皇帝决断。

四、时限
本诏令自门下省审议通过之日起生效。
